title: heterotheca lamarckii
intro: Heterotheca lamarckii, also known as the gray false goldeneye, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and wounds. Heterotheca lamarckii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
